frontendProviders.compiler: CompilerProvider: backend job API, synchronous fallback, mock draft, browser-WASM placeholder
frontendProviders.ai: AIProvider: backend proxy for OpenAI, Claude/Anthropic, Gemini
frontendProviders.sync: SyncProvider: local-only, HTTP project save/load, reserved WebSocket sync
frontendProviders.preview: PreviewAdapter: draft HTML preview and PDF blob iframe

stage1cAdds: Compile jobs are first-class objects with queued/running/succeeded/failed/canceled statuses.
Frontend submits jobs, polls status, updates progress, renders PDF when ready, and falls back to synchronous compile if needed.
Backend writes each compile into an isolated temporary workspace, enforces path validation, byte limits, shell-escape policy, and compile timeouts.
Compile logs are parsed into structured diagnostics with file/line where possible.
Diagnostics are clickable and jump to the matching source line.
